/usr/bin/clang++  -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  -fsanitize=address,undefined CMakeFiles/test_core.dir/test_core_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_core.dir/test_types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_core.dir/test_ear_clipping.cpp.o -o test_core  ../core/libcore.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest_main.a -lpthread /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest.a
